acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects audit reports missing boolean verificationEvidence.diffReviewed, completionReportReviewed, or verificationEvidenceReviewed.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh uses the existing expect_jq pattern to require all three verificationEvidence fields as booleans; evidence/m4-qd-audit-schema-contract/commands.log records the negative smoke test.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing audit reports pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-audit-schema-contract/commands.log records the checker passing against existing reports after the stricter validation was added.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records qd report checking and shared check passing.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-audit-schema-contract/commands.log records `bash scripts/qd-reports-check.sh`, `nix develop -c just qd-reports-check`, and `nix develop -c just check`.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false and status is not_required for this repository-only schema checker change.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd audit-report schema validation only; Linux validation passed and macOS validation is not required.
